nodes.label: AI for writing refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I usually write a full draft myself. I find if I don't then it's harder for the AI to pick up on the context

nodes.label: AI for document analysis with reasoning
nodes.label_negative: AI for document analysis without reasoning
nodes.grounding_span: as long as it gives good reasoning for why it thinks the answer it's provided is correct, I'll usually accept it first time

nodes.label: AI accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: Gemini kept making things up that weren't in the original statement

nodes.label: AI for high-stakes accuracy tasks
nodes.grounding_span: the forms need to be completely accurate, and our AI-like automation already makes mistakes

nodes.label: Human authenticity in client communication
nodes.grounding_span: there's an artificiality to it that makes it obvious quickly that it hasn't been written by a human

nodes.label: AI for repetitive tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for creative or nuanced tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If the automation aspects get better, then I could see myself using it more for the more repetitve parts of my job

nodes.label: Accuracy and truthfulness
nodes.grounding_span: We can't submit false information so I couldn't use it

nodes.label: Human authenticity and client trust
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think my employer would want clients to feel like they are talking with robots

nodes.label: Efficiency and reduced drudgery
nodes.grounding_span: I could see myself using it more for the more repetitve parts of my job that I'd rather not do

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for document analysis when reasoning is provided
nodes.grounding_span: as long as it gives good reasoning for why it thinks the answer it's provided is correct, I'll usually accept it first time

nodes.label: Frustration with AI fabrication in sensitive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Gemini kept making things up that weren't in the original statement

nodes.label: Nervousness about AI for high-accuracy tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'd be nervous about using AI for those tasks as the forms need to be completely accurate

nodes.label: Concern about AI artificiality in client communication
nodes.grounding_span: there's an artificiality to it that makes it obvious quickly that it hasn't been written by a human

nodes.label: Openness to using AI more for repetitive tasks if accuracy improves
nodes.grounding_span: If the automation aspects get better, then I could see myself using it more for the more repetitve parts of my job

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — prefers to write draft first then refine with AI

nodes.label: Evidence-based trust — requires reasoning before accepting AI output
